_doc: Live deployment addresses for Carbon DEX. anvil-local section is the deterministic CREATE chain that DemoLocal.s.sol produces against anvil's default funded keys (account 0); sepolia section is the actual Sepolia deployment from 2026-05-10 (Deploy.s.sol --broadcast --verify --verifier sourcify, all 6 contracts Sourcify exact_match).

sepolia._demoReady: Phase 3 of Deploy.s.sol seeded pool 350k EURS / 5k EUA at €70 spot + pre-issued 500 EUA inventory to Company B (for the bidirectional b-bot mirroring). Companies A + B + deployer all registered. Chain is fresh: zero allocations to A yet, audit log has the LP-seed + B-inventory entries. Click Issue on /regulator to start the demo flow.

ens._naming: Subdomain scheme: 'verified-entity.eth' is owned by the regulator (institutional namespace). Each verified company gets a subdomain on registration. Regulator itself uses bare 'eu-ets-authority.eth'. Live on Sepolia ENS as of 2026-05-10 — Parth registered the two .eth names then transferred to our deployer; we created the two subdomains. All four names resolve correctly via cast resolve-name.
